name: CRC controlled-access ledger
what_it_solves: Access ledger for CRC datasets relevant to BreAK CRC-001 diligence.
how_it_solves: crc_access_top_memo + crc_controlled_access_ledger.csv track which CRC datasets can be pulled and which are blocked.
why_it_exists: Feeds the Brenus diligence module with a testable data-availability status — no more 'we could probably get that data' claims.
